context.projectOverview: agent-bober priority-hub spec. Sprint 3 (highest complexity) adds: src/hub/scope.ts (Scope discriminated union general|decision{a,b}|filtered{domain?,dueWithinDays?,tag?} + parseScope + pure applyFilter), src/hub/lenses.ts (hub-specific prioritization lens catalog mirroring eval-lenses LENS_CATALOG shape — NOT reusing eval lenses), src/hub/judge.ts (rankFindings: pass1 relevance-filter via injected LLMClient for decision/general, applyFilter for filtered; pass2 prioritization-lens fan-out with strict-majority fail-closed-on-tie reconcile; then deterministic JS final ordering). The LLM NEVER emits the final ordered list — deterministic JS arranges over LLM-produced scores.

completedSprints.title: Collector + resolver + readonly
completedSprints.summary: src/hub/collector.ts (collectFindings dedup by id), repo-resolver.ts, FactStore { readonly } flag. hub list aggregates across siblings.

relevantFiles: src/hub/finding.ts (Finding type — REUSE, do not change)
src/orchestrator/eval-lenses.ts:1-31 (LENS_CATALOG + resolveLensFocus fan-out SHAPE to mirror — but define hub-specific prioritization lenses: urgency, impact, effort/ROI, deadline-risk)
skills/shared/lens-panel.md:73-89 (strict-majority + fail-closed-on-tie reconcile semantics to port: passCount>failCount, tie => not included => flagged-for-review)
src/chat/answerer.ts:11-17 (LLMClient injection pattern to mirror for testable judge)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (ESM .js extensions, import type, Zod safeParse for LLM output, provider-agnostic LLMClient, async fs, vitest collocated, conventional commits)
